data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Due-date reminders' but failed to provide any evidence confirming that this functionality exists within the system. The linked use case mentions due-date reminders as a need, but there is no evidence in the prior steps or linked use cases that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of due-date reminders. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of due-date reminders functionality in the system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
